per_criterion.name: Typographic discipline vs Emil
per_criterion.note: B introduces body prose at a consistent size/weight that echoes Emil's diary register; A has a naked hero hanging in whitespace with nothing to establish rhythm.

per_criterion.name: Warmth / personality vs Daniel
per_criterion.note: B adds a human first-person voice which lends faint warmth, but neither candidate offers any color, texture, or visual moment — both read austere.

per_criterion.name: Hero establishes 'designing with machines'
per_criterion.note: A's 'designing with machines' tagline is ungrounded and reads like any portfolio; B's three paragraphs actually stake a position about AI, prototyping, and leadership.

per_criterion.name: Vignettes as considered artifacts
per_criterion.note: Identical — both screenshots show bare text-list work entries with no visual artifacts rendered; this is the biggest unaddressed weakness in both.
